display_name: Indy Praxis — Neighbor First AI Enablement
open_threads: CCF Budget & Goals spreadsheet due March 26, 2026 by noon — submitted via email to CCF@iedc.in.gov
If approved: project kicks off July 2026

deliverables.description: Praxis proposal with Options A and B
CCF 2026 Application Summary — Neighbor First AI Enablement

notes: Full scope: Executive Agent Build ($13,500) + Community Matching Engine Build ($16,500) + Cloud Infrastructure ($6,600) = $36,600 CCF request. Match: Indy Praxis $4,562 + Polk Stables $4,562 = $9,122 cash (25%). Project period July 2026 - June 2027. Lead ESO: Indy Praxis (via NCF/DAF). Partner: Polk Stables. All execution by A&A (Joel). Contacts: Joel Austin (primary), Greg Enas (alternate).
